title: Create: Wrencheable Planes
description: Makes planes from immersive aircraft wrencheable with the create wrench.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4ba4YZ1HBeE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Note: This was an extremely early prototype of the pack. There is no "explosion" present anymore nor is the scoreboard on the side visible by default.


The last year, i've played on many community servers with planes, and i've always noticed something.

It takes Forever to break them. Especially planes from addons. So introducing:

Wrencheable Planes!
Using the create wrench, you can now wrench your plane instead of hitting it 50+ times!


# How It Works:

It's quite simple, just sneak, while holding a wrench, and your plane will turn into item form!

**But why don't you need to right click?**

Right clicking would honestly take forever to code in. It is possible, but I would have to use an interaction entity, which I was planning to at first, until you realize you can't interact through an interaction entity. Meaning every time you're shifting and holding a wrench, you can't interact with any other blocks, breaking creates wrench fuctionality with ever other block.

I can't use carrot on a stick detection either because the wrench doesn't have any custom right click score unlike the carrot on a stick. I also can't make the wrench "slightly edible" since that was added in a future minecraft version.

If I figure out a way to have good right click detection trust me, i'll add right clicking, but for now, no right clicking.


# Performance:

The performance impact is extremely minimal, there will be no lag.

Thanks for downloading my datapack! I hope it's useful to you! If you encounter any issues, or want an addon mod to work, make a comment on curseforge or DM me on discord (@fj.7g)
